business.name: SZATER - Electrical & Telecom Installations
hero.badge: SEP & UDT Licensed — Insured for 100,000 PLN
hero.title: Professional Electrical & Telecom Installations in Warsaw
hero.subtitle: Comprehensive electrical and telecom services for homes and businesses. SEP certifications, 100,000 PLN liability insurance, warranty on every job. From design to handover — everything in one place.
trustBar.title: Trusted by 500+ Clients in Warsaw
services.title: Electrical & Telecom Installations
services.subtitle: Full service from design to completion. We work with homeowners, developers, and businesses across Warsaw and surrounding areas.
services.items.electrical.title: Electrical Installations
services.items.electrical.description: Complete electrical installations in houses and apartments. Upgrading old aluminum wiring to copper, switchboard installation, outlets, lighting. Every installation with measurement and protocol.
services.items.smartHome.title: Smart Home Systems
services.items.smartHome.description: Intelligent control of lighting, blinds, heating, and air conditioning. KNX, Loxone, Fibaro systems. Home automation tailored to your needs.
services.items.networks.title: LAN & Telecom Networks
services.items.networks.description: Structured cabling, LAN/WLAN computer networks, WiFi access points. Professional installation with certification and network performance testing.
services.items.intercom.title: Video Intercoms & Doorbells
services.items.intercom.description: Installation and configuration of video intercoms. Single and multi-family systems, phone integration. Brands: Hikvision, Dahua, Commax.
services.items.alarm.title: Alarm Systems
services.items.alarm.description: Design and installation of alarm systems. Motion sensors, magnetic contacts, sirens, phone notifications. Wired and wireless systems.
services.items.rtvsat.title: RTV-SAT Installations
services.items.rtvsat.description: Satellite and terrestrial antenna installation, collective systems for multi-family buildings. Multiswitch, splitters, reception configuration.
services.items.cctv.title: CCTV Monitoring
services.items.cctv.description: Video surveillance systems for homes, businesses, and construction sites. IP cameras, recorders, remote viewing on your phone. Brands: Hikvision, Dahua.
services.items.measurements.title: Measurements & Certification
services.items.measurements.description: Electrical installation measurements, acceptance and periodic testing. Measurement protocols required by law. Insulation resistance and loop impedance testing.
services.items.planning.title: Installation Design
services.items.planning.description: Electrical and telecom installation projects. Switchboard schematics, outlet and lighting placement plans. Consultations during construction or renovation planning.
services.items.smartLocks.title: Smart Door Locks
services.items.smartLocks.description: Installation and configuration of electronic and smart locks. Open by code, fingerprint, card, or phone. Integration with smart home systems.
process.title: 4 Simple Steps to Completion
process.subtitle: Professional from first contact to handover. No hidden costs, full documentation.
process.steps.0.title: Contact & Quote
process.steps.0.description: Call or write — tell us about your project. We'll prepare a free quote within 24 hours.
process.steps.1.title: On-Site Visit
process.steps.1.description: We come to your location, assess technical conditions, and discuss the details of the project.
process.steps.2.title: Installation
process.steps.2.description: We complete the installation according to specifications, PN standards, and regulations. We use only top-quality materials.
process.steps.3.title: Handover & Warranty
process.steps.3.description: After completion, we perform measurements, hand over protocols, and provide a warranty on all work.

serviceArea.title: Serving Warsaw and Surrounding Areas
serviceArea.subtitle: We take on projects in Warsaw and within a 50km radius — Piaseczno, Pruszków, Legionowo, Wołomin and more.
testimonials.title: What Our Clients Say
testimonials.subtitle: Reviews from Google and direct recommendations.
testimonials.items.0.author: Marek Z. — Wilanów
testimonials.items.0.text: The SZATER team did our complete electrical installation in our new house. Everything perfect — the switchboard is a work of art, cables routed immaculately. Mateusz recommended a smart home system and we have no regrets. Highly recommended.
testimonials.items.1.author: Katarzyna & Piotr D. — Mokotów
testimonials.items.1.text: We commissioned the replacement of old aluminum wiring with copper in our 1970s apartment. Clean, fast work with full documentation and measurements. Price matched the quote, no surprises. Finally an honest electrician!
testimonials.items.2.author: Tomasz R. — Piaseczno
testimonials.items.2.text: Hikvision CCTV + video intercom + alarm — everything integrated, phone monitoring works great. Professional workmanship, proper documentation. I'll definitely come back for a smart home installation.
about.title: About SZATER
about.story.title: A Passion for Electrical Work for Over 10 Years
about.story.content: SZATER is a company founded by Mateusz Szater — an electrician with over 10 years of experience in the installation industry. We operate in Warsaw and surrounding areas, offering comprehensive electrical and telecom installation services. We hold SEP and UDT certifications, liability insurance for 100,000 PLN, and NIP: 7582386767. We specialize in installations for single-family homes, apartments, and commercial properties. Every project is treated individually — from small repairs to complete installations from scratch. We focus on quality workmanship, safety, and aesthetics. We use materials from renowned manufacturers and complete every installation with measurements and protocols.
about.commitment.title: Quality & Safety Guarantee
about.commitment.content: Every installation is carried out in accordance with current PN standards and building regulations. After completion, we hand over a full documentation package: schematics, measurement protocols, and warranty card. If anything needs correction within the warranty period — we return and fix it at no extra cost. We value long-term client relationships, which is why quality and honesty are the foundation of our work.
contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: Describe your project — we'll get back to you within 24 hours. You can also call +48 570 160 416.
